card.name: Boros Standard Bearer RAW
card.text: When this creature dies, create a 1/1 red and white Soldier creature token. {4}{W}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Brightsteel Interceptor
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, tap or untap up to one target artifact or creature. Preamble {3}{WU}{WU} ({3}{WU}{WU}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Protect the Precinct
card.text: Choose one — • This spell deals X damage to target attacking or blocking creature, where X is 2 plus the number of creatures you control. • Untap up to two target creatures you control.

card.name: Firemane Protector
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Flying When this creature enters, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Gate Physician
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life. This creature has lifelink as long as you control a Gate.

card.name: Spiretop Courier
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, scry 1 and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Guildpact Faithful
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures you control. They gain protection from monocolored until your next turn. (Those creatures can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything monocolored until your next turn.)

card.name: Shield of Compassion
card.text: Flash Enchant creature When this Aura enters, enchanted creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Enchanted creature gets +0/+2 and can block an additional creature.

card.name: Angelic Rebuke
card.text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment or creature with power or toughness 4 or greater. Then if {R} was spent to cast this spell, it deals 3 damage to that permanent's controller.

card.name: Press the Advantage
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Creatures you control get +2/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Righteous Uprising
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a 1/1 white Human creature token. If one or more tokens would be created under your control, three times that many of those tokens are created instead.

card.name: Wall of Fury
card.text: Defender, reach This creature's power is equal to the number of creatures you control. At the beginning of combat on your turn, another target creature you control gets +X/+0 and gains haste until end of turn, where X is this creature's power.

card.name: Sanctum of Protection
card.text: Players can't sacrifice nonland permanents to cast spells or activate abilities. Spells and abilities your opponents control can't cause you to sacrifice permanents.

card.name: Aurelia's Judgment
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Destroy all creatures. You gain 1 life for each creature you controlled that was destroyed this way.

card.name: Loyal Warhound
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Another target creature or planeswalker you control gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Valiant District Protector
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever this creature attacks, target creature you control with power less than or equal to this creature gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Bounty Claimer
card.text: When this creature enters, create X 1/1 white Human creature tokens, where X is the number of Gates you control. Whenever a Gate you control enters, create a tapped 1/1 white Human creature token.

card.name: Featherscale Drake
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, tap all creatures you don't control and untap all creatures you control.

card.name: Outmatch
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target tapped creature. • Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures you control. They gain vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Eidolon's Flight RAW
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a 2/2 white Spirit creature token with flying. Scry 2. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, return this enchantment to its owner's hand.

card.name: Express Mandate
card.text: Flash Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Benthic Protector
card.text: Implant {2}{U} ({2}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Defender (This creature can't attack.) During your turn, this creature has hexproof.

card.name: Enlighted Freemage
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from exile, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Raskal Parfumist
card.text: Flash Flying Whenever you activate an ability that's not a mana ability, target player mills two cards. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Fin Clade Guardian
card.text: Implant {2}{U} ({2}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Flying, vigilance

card.name: Gate Infiltrator
card.text: Whenever this creature deals damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card. This creature can't be blocked as long as you control a Gate.

card.name: Spliced Guardian
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) {2}{G}, Remove a +1/+1 counter from a creature you control: Draw a card.

card.name: Lyev Skywatch
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return up to one other target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Chains of Submission
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -5/-0 and loses all abilities.

card.name: Reprocess Essence
card.text: Counter target creature or planeswalker spell. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.

card.name: Cleanse
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If that spell is monocolored, counter it unless its controller pays {3} instead.

card.name: Void Wave
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you cast a spell from exile this turn. Return target creature to its owner's hand. Scry 1.

card.name: Fluxfeather Eagle
card.text: Flash Flying Whenever you activate an ability that's not a mana ability, you may pay {2}{U}. When you do, create a token that's a copy of this creature.

card.name: Experiment Twenty-Six
card.text: Implant {2}{U} ({2}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Whenever this creature enters or deals combat damage to a player, you may have it become a copy of target creature, except it isn't legendary and has this ability. When you do, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Time Typhoon
card.text: End the current phase. (Exile all spells and abilities from the stack, including this card. If this was cast during the ending phase, the player whose turn it is discards down to their maximum hand size, damage wears off, and "this turn" and "until end of turn" effects end.)

card.name: Synapse Linker
card.text: Other creatures you control have all my abilities except this one.

card.name: Elusive Biomage
card.text: Implant {2}{U} ({2}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) This creature can't be blocked.

card.name: Absorbed Attendant
card.text: When this creature enters, scry 2. {T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast a spell from exile. {T}: Add {C}{U}. Spend this mana only to activate an ability.

card.name: Lawmage Familliar
card.text: Flash Flying {U}, Sacrifice this creature: Counter target noncreature spell or ability unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: Cocky Fluxmage
card.text: Flying At the beginning of combat on your turn, up to one target creature you control loses all its abilities and becomes a blue Bird creature with base power and toughness X/X and flying until end of turn, where X is the number of Gates you control.

card.name: Aethermage's Contempt
card.text: Choose one — • The owner of target nonland permanent puts it on top of their library or on the bottom. • Return up to two target attacking creatures to their owner's hand.

card.name: Untwine
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it. Counter target spell, activated ability, or triggered ability unless its controller pays {X}.

card.name: Reconsider
card.text: Surveil 2, then draw two cards. (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Eidolon's Vision
card.text: Draw four cards, then put two cards from your hand on the top or bottom of your library in any order. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, return this enchantment to its owner's hand.

card.name: Fungal Pest
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, surveil 1.

card.name: Carnarium Acrobat
card.text: Deathtouch Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it, draw a card and lose 1 life. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Jubilent Sewer Cook RAW
card.text: When this creature enters, mill two cards and you gain 2 life. Swarm 1—{1}{B} ({1}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Stage Cleaner
card.text: Flash Flying Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have defending player lose 2 life. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: First District Paragon
card.text: Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.) When this creature enters, if you control two or more Gates, up to one target creature gains lifelink and indestructible until your next turn.

card.name: Swarm Broodmother RAW
card.text: Flying Swarm 3—{4}{B}{B} ({4}{B}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create three 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Undercity Cleaner
card.text: When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and draw a card.

card.name: Enraged Hellhound
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) {R}: Target creature you control gains haste until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Eaten From Within
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. This spell costs {2} less to cast for each creature sacrificed this way. Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Reap
card.text: Choose one — • Target opponent sacrifices a creature. • Target opponent exiles a monocolored creature they control.

card.name: Jagged Edges
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/-1. When enchanted creature dies under your control, draw a card.

card.name: The Show Never Ends RAW
card.text: Choose one — • Create a 2/1 black and red Elemental Dog creature token with menace, haste and "This creature can't block." • Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Cytoplasm Carrier
card.text: Enchant land you control When this Aura enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control and you gain 2 life. Enchanted land has "{1}, {T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors."

card.name: Deathgorger
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Whenever another creature dies, put a +1/+1 counters on this creature. If you controlled that creature, put two +1/+1 counters on this creature instead.

card.name: Demon Progeny RAW
card.text: Defender Whenever another creature dies, put an egg counter on this creature. {T}, Remove six egg counters from this creature: Create a 6/6 black Demon creature token with flying. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Skull Clamper Parasite
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, you may exile target creature card from a graveyard. If you do, this creature becomes a copy of that card, except it's an Insect in addition to its other types and has lifelink.

card.name: Gorespawn Demon
card.text: Flying, trample At the beginning of each upkeep, each player draws a card. Whenever a player draws a card, they lose 1 life. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have target player draw seven cards. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Gruesome Spectacle
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies during your turn, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn — • Each opponent sacrifices a creature. • Each opponent loses 3 life. • Draw a card.

card.name: Daughter of Stone Death RAW
card.text: When this creature enters, other creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. {1}{B}, Discard this card: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Swarm 2—{2}{B} ({2}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Swarm Evangel RAW
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink Swarm 1—{1}{B} ({1}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Fired-Up Jester
card.text: When this creature enters, discard up to two cards, then draw that many cards. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have it deal damage equal to the number of creature cards in your graveyard to target opponent. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Corpse Jeweler RAW
card.text: Whenever another creature you control dies, create a Treasure token. This ability triggers only once each turn. {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Surveil 1. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice a token: Draw a card.

card.name: Deceitful Guide
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, sacrifice up to three other creatures. Choose one for each creature sacrificed this way — • Target player discards a card. • Target player draws a card and loses 1 life. • Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Smog Predator
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, target creature you don't control gets -X/-X until end if turn, where X is the number of Gates you control. Whenever a Gate you control enters, target creature you don't control gets -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Vengeful Hands
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile a creature card from your graveyard. This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the exiled card's mana value. Exile target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Eidolon's Infestation RAW
card.text: When this enchantment enters, look at the top four cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, return this enchantment to its owner's hand.

card.name: Incite Delirium
card.text: Choose one — • Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it or a card from their graveyard. Exile that card. • Target player draws two cards and loses 2 life.

card.name: Boros Phalanx
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.) When this creature enters, it deals 3 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Sting Elemental
card.text: Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.) When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target. If a player is dealt damage this way, scry 1.

card.name: Sunblade Captain
card.text: If another creature or planeswalker dealt damage by this creature would die this turn, exile it instead. {1}{W}: This creature gains first strike until end of turn. (This creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)

card.name: Second District Keeper
card.text: Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.) When this creature enters, if you control two or more Gates, it fights up to one target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Circle Headliner RAW
card.text: When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and create a Treasure token. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Wheel of Agony
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice a creature. This spell deals 2 damage to any target. If a creature was sacrificed, it deals 3 damage to any target instead and you scry 1.

card.name: Collateral
card.text: Choose one — • This spell deals 1 damage to each opponent and each creature they control. • This spell deals 3 damage to target creature.

card.name: Just Strike
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Subjugate
card.text: Enchant creature When this enchantment enters, target creature can't block this turn. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has haste and "If this creature would deal combat damage to a monocolored creature, it deals that much damage plus 2 instead."

card.name: Furious Upheaval
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target creature with defender. • Create two 1/1 white Human creature tokens.

card.name: Obliterating Strike
card.text: Until end of turn, permanents your opponents control lose indestructible and can't gain indestructible. This spell deals 6 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If that permanent would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Backstage Preparations RAW
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards. Then if {B} was spent to cast this spell, create a Treasure token and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Ceaseless Anger RAW
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, create X 1/1 red Elemental creature tokens, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control. They gain haste until end of turn. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Bewitching Lead
card.text: Ward—Pay 3 life. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and untap each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it. After this combat phase, there is an additional combat step. Do this only once each turn. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Firstblade Lieutenant RAW
card.text: First strike Whenever one ore more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token. Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Fearless Freemage
card.text: When this creature enters, add X mana in any combination of colors, where X is the number of Gates you control. Whenever a Gate you control enters, add {R}.

card.name: Flame-kin Commander
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) When this creature enters, it deals X damage divided as you chose among any number of targets, where X is the number of creatures you control or the highest power among creatures you control, whichever is greater.

card.name: Rakdos Excrutiator
card.text: Your opponents can't gain life. Damage can't be prevented. Spells and abilities you control that target an opponent and/or a permanent they control can't be countered.

card.name: Shackled Blooddrake
card.text: When this creature enters, target opponent discards a card. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have it gain flying. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Wojek Avenger
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, this creature deals 1 damage to target player or planeswalker.

card.name: Welcoming Ringleader RAW
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, create a 1/1 red Devil creature token with "When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target". Whenever this creature attacks, target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Goldscale Whelp RAW
card.text: Flying, first strike, haste This creature can't block. {2}{R}, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card and create a Treasure token.

card.name: Mourning Legionnaire
card.text: Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, draw a card. Sacrifice this creature: Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Fiery Comeuppance
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) This spell deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If a permanent dealt damage by this spell would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: All Consuming Rage
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. This spell costs {2} less to cast for each creature sacrificed this way. This spell deals 4 damage divided as you choose among any number of targets.

card.name: Krenko's Ransack RAW
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target land. • Create three 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens. • Discard your hand, then draw two cards and create a Treasure token.

card.name: Eidolon's Impetus RAW
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a 5/1 red Elemental creature token with trample and haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, return this enchantment to its owner's hand.

card.name: Uncontained Hulk
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control and you gain 1 life. Whenever this creature dies, put its counters on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Golgari Rotseer
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {T}: Add {G}. {T}, Exile a card from your graveyard: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Hound Krasis
card.text: Implant {1}{G} ({1}{G}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Vigilance, haste

card.name: Anglershark Krasis
card.text: Implant {2}{G} ({2}{G}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Trample

card.name: Breeding Plant Supervisor
card.text: Whenever you activate an ability that's not a mana ability, you may pay {1}{G}. When you do, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. {3}{G}: Create a 0/0 green Ooze creature token. Put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Underdeep Kraul
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) {B}, Sacrifice another creature: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Gate Bulwark
card.text: Defender, vigilance This creature can attack as though it didn't have defender as long as you control a Gate.

card.name: Undercity Ravager RAW
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, you gain 4 life. Swarm 3—{4}{G}{G} ({4}{G}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create three 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Ochran's Solution
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control that's a token and/or has a +1/+1 counter on it. Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control.

card.name: Return to the Cycle
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each monocolored permanents or cards it targets. Choose one or more — • Destroy target artifact or enchantment. • Exile target card from a graveyard. • Put up to one target face-up exiled card you don't own into its owner's graveyard.

card.name: Swarm's Voracity
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each creature you control or each +1/+1 counters among creatures you control, whichever is greater. • Destroy target creature with flying.

card.name: Redo
card.text: Choose one or both — • Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. • Return target land card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Rotquake
card.text: Destroy target creature or land. Then if {G} was spent to cast this spell, search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Aspect of Rebirth
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, mill five cards. Then return up to one permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. When you do, put X +1/+1 counters on each creature you control, where X is the mana value of the permanent returned this way.

card.name: Perfected Rebirth
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice a creature. Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Then if the additional cost was cast, put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the total power and toughness of the sacrificed creature.

card.name: Insatiable Troll
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, it fights up to one target creature you don't control. {2}{G}{G}, Sacrifice two creatures: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped with a finality counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Woodwraith Behemoth RAW
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, create a tapped token that's a copy of it, except it's a land with "{T}: Add one mana of any color." Do this only once each turn. Swarm 2—{2}{G} ({2}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Rotten Banquet RAW
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Choose one — • Create X 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens, where X is the sacrificed creature's toughness. • Put X +1/+1 counters on target creature, where X is the sacrificed creature's power.

card.name: Deathbloom Mandrake RAW
card.text: Reach Whenever another creature you control dies or one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Swarm 1—{1}{G} ({1}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Ochran Stalker RAW
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Swarm 1—{BG}{BG} ({BG}{BG}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Corrosive Experiment
card.text: Implant {2}{G} ({2}{G}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Deathtouch

card.name: Ravenous Sewerscraper
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or pay {2}. This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: Dauntless Protector
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, each of up to X target creatures you control gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn, where X is the number of Gates you control.

card.name: Cytoplasmic Membrane
card.text: Choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It fights up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: Ooze Hydra
card.text: Implant {3}{G}{G} ({3}{G}{G}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Whenever this creature enters, deals combat damage to a player or dies, create two 0/0 green Ooze creature tokens. Put a +1/+1 counter on each of them. Then put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Recovering Wilds
card.text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards and/or Gate cards, reveal those cards, put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard, then shuffle. {1}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Return up to two target land cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Eidolon's Genesis
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw a card and you gain 3 life. You may play an additional land this turn. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, return this enchantment to its owner's hand.

card.name: Surging Horror RAW
card.text: Haste This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature. Swarm 2—{1}{B}{G} ({1}{B}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Inspect the Remains
card.text: Mill five cards. Put a creature or land card from your graveyard into your hand.

card.name: Mangled Rootgiant
card.text: Reach, trample When this creature enters, you gain 3 life and surveil 3.

card.name: Splatterhouse Ravager
card.text: Sacrifice another creature: Draw a card. Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.

card.name: Ring Fire Maniac
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes blocked by a creature, it deals 1 damage to that creature and its controller. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have it gain menace. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Macabre Spectacle
card.text: This spell deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. Its controller loses life equal to the excess damage dealt this way.

card.name: Havoc Bringer
card.text: Flying, deathtouch When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to target opponent. That player discards a card.

card.name: Gyre Clade Guardian
card.text: Implant {1}{GU}{GU} ({1}{GU}{GU}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Plaxplated Biotitan
card.text: Flying, trample, ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: Adaptive Surge
card.text: Choose one or more — • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Untap it. • Return target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Scaly Hummerbrood
card.text: Implant {1}{G}{U} ({1}{G}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Flying, trample

card.name: Sunhome Defender
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Vigilance Ward—Pay 2 life.

card.name: Skyrender Knight
card.text: Flying Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to target opponent and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Firefist's Indignation
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) This spell deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Firemane Executioner
card.text: Flying, first strike, haste

card.name: Magistrate's Pet
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, scry 1. Preamble {1}{W} ({1}{W}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Rakdos Ragefest
card.text: All creatures have haste, decayed, and attack each combat if able. They lose defender and can't have or gain defender. Whenever a creature dies, each player draws cards and loses life equal to that creature's power.

card.name: Escaped Hellsteed
card.text: Haste Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may return target creature card from a graveyard to the battlefield under your control tapped and attacking and put a +1/+1 counter on both of them. If you do, sacrifice both of them at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Vannifar, Voice of the Combine RAW
Replicating Abomination
card.text: Implant {2}{G}{U} ({2}{G}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of target creature or land you control.

card.name: Containment Breach
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Search cards you own in exile with implant, your library, graveyard, and/or hand for any number of creature cards with total mana value X or less and put them onto the battlefield. If you search your library this way, shuffle. If X is 6 or greater, each of those creatures enter with X additional +1/+1 counters. Exile this card.

card.name: On Wings of Fury RAW
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Create X 4/4 white Angel creature tokens with flying and vigilance. Untap all creatures you control. They gain haste until end of turn. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Radiant Champion
card.text: This spell can't be countered. At the beginning of combat on your turn, return target creature card with power 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Put a +1/+1 counter on it. It gains haste until end of turn and attacks each combat this turn if able.

card.name: Juri, Charismatic Performer RAW
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you may sacrifice another creature. When you do, choose one — • Draw a card and create a Treasure token. • Put two +1/+1 counters on Juri. Then he deals damage equal to the number of counters on him to target opponent.

card.name: Rix Maadi Abomination
card.text: First strike Ward—Discard a card. If a creature attacking or dying causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Devastation in the Streets
card.text: Chose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target creature. • Destroy target planeswalker.

card.name: Mindflare
card.text: This spell can't be countered. This spell deals X damage to target player, where X is the number of cards in that player's hand. Then, that player exiles that many cards from the top of their library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play cards exiled this way, and mana of any type can be spent to cast spells among them.

card.name: Gleeful Skinner
card.text: Double strike, lifelink If a player would gain life, each of your opponent loses that much life instead. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have each other creature you control gain double strike and lifelink until end of turn. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Unleash RAW
card.text: Create two 2/1 black and red Elemental Dog creature token with menace, haste, and "This creature can't block." Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Gulistan, Master Biomancer
card.text: Vigilance {X}{G}{G}{U}, {T}: Choose up to one other target nontoken creature you control. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it isn't legendary, is a Frog Lizard creature and has base power and toughness 0/0. Put X +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Metamorphosed Adapter
card.text: Whenever you activate an ability that's not a mana ability, you may copy it. If you do, you may choose new targets for the copy. Do this only once each turn. If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, twice that many +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.

card.name: Force Shaping
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target activated or triggered ability. • Copy target triggered or activated ability. You may chose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Skybreaker Biotitan
card.text: Implant {3}{G}{U} ({3}{G}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Flying, trample Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then you may cast a spell from your hand with mana value less than or equal to the damage dealt without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Psychogenetic Tap
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. You may play an additional land this turn.

card.name: Transform // Transmute
card.text:
Target creature loses all abilities and becomes a green and blue Mutant creature with base power and toughness 5/5 until end of turn.
---
Choose a non-Aura permanent on the battlefield. Put a +1/+1 counter on another target permanent you control. It becomes a copy of the chosen permanent.

card.name: Firemane's Flamberge
card.text: Flash When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. Equipped creature gets +1/+0 for each attacking creatures and has flying and first strike. Equip {3}

card.name: Recruitment Campaign
card.text: Search your library for a creature card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Then you may put a creature card with power 2 or less from your hand onto the battlefield. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Ordruun Marshal RAW
card.text: When this creature enters, create two 1/1 red and white Soldier creature tokens. Whenever this creature attacks or blocks, the next spell you cast this turn without muster has muster. (That spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.)

card.name: Incandescent Blessing
card.text: Choose up to one creature or planeswalker you control. Prevent all damage that would be dealt to it this turn. This spell deals 3 damage to each creature and planeswalker.

card.name: Diana, Passer of Judgment
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever a player attacks, Diana gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the total power of other attacking creatures. Then if her power is 10 or greater, she gains trample and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Volley // Volatile
card.text:
This spell deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker, where X is twice the number of creatures you control.
---
For each permanent type, each player sacrifices a permanent of that type. This spell deals damage to each player equal to the total number of permanents they sacrificed this way.

card.name: Arrester Captain
card.text: When this creature enters, look at an opponent's hand, then choose any card name. Spells of the chosen name cost {2} more to cast. Abilities of nonland permanents or cards of the chosen name cost {2} more to activate. Preamble {2}{WU}{WU} ({2}{WU}{WU}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Fester
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay 3 life or discard a card. Destroy target artifact, creature, or planeswalker.

card.name: Forsaken Loxodon
card.text: Trample Ward—Pay life equal to this creature's power. This creature's power is equal to the number of creatures you control or the number of creature cards in your graveyard, whichever is greater.

card.name: Gutbloom Host
card.text: Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.) {BG}, Sacrifice a creature: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Fungus Nursery RAW
card.text: When this enchantment enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 1. {1}{BG}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw a card and you gain 1 life. Swarm 3—{3}{B}{G} ({3}{B}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create three 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Decay Guildmage
card.text: {2}{BG}, {T}: Surveil 2. {3}{B}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control. They gain menace until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Bitter // Twisted
card.text:
Destroy target creature or planeswalker with mana value 3 or less.
---
Exile each card that was put into an opponent's graveyard this turn. Draw a card.

card.name: The Curtain Falls
card.text: Destroy all artifacts, creatures and planeswalkers.

card.name: Xaren, Rakdos Uncager RAW
card.text: Whenever Xaren or another nontoken creature you control dies, create a 2/1 black and red Elemental Dog creature token with menace, haste, and "This creature can't block." This ability triggers only once each turn. {BR}, {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Xaren deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Giant Roustabout
card.text: Trample Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have it fight target creature you don't control. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Critics Hunter
card.text: Haste Decayed (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) {BR}, Pay 3 life: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Wojek Recruitee
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Chaos Guildmage
card.text: {BR}, {T}: Target creature you control gains menace until end of turn. {2}{B}{R}: Another target creature you control gains "When this creature dies, it deals damage equal to its power to target opponent and you gain that much life." until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Ball // Chain
card.text:
Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
---
Each creature you control that entered this turn gets +1/+0 and gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Praj, Momir Vig's Legacy
card.text: Abilities you control that target this creature cost {1} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana. {1}{G}{U}: Put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature. Praj and that creature gain each other's abilities until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Crypsis Clade Agent
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, return up to one other target nonland permanent you control to its owner's hand. If it had a counter on it, draw a card.

card.name: Transfigure
card.text: Exile target permanent, then its controller reveals cards from the top of their library until they reveal a card that shares a card type with the exiled permanent. They put that card onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of their library in any order. Shuffle this card into its owner's library.

card.name: Ooze Bioprocessor
card.text: Implant {G}{U} ({G}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Whenever you tap a permanent with a +1/+1 counter on it for mana, add {G} or {U}. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Cerebral Plating
card.text: Creature spells you control and abilities of creatures you control can't be countered. Nontoken creatures you control enter with an additional +1/+1 counter on them.

card.name: Evolution Guildmage
card.text: {GU}, {T}: Target creature you control gains vigilance until end of turn. {2}{G}{U}: Copy target creature spell, activated ability, or triggered ability. You may choose new targets for the copy. (A copy of a creature spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Live // Learn
card.text:
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.
---
Draw a card for each different power among creatures you control, then discard a card.

card.name: Boros Rallier
card.text: Flash Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Spark Legion RAW
card.text: When this enchantment enters and at the beginning of your precombat main phase, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token. It gains lifelink and haste until end of turn and attacks each combat this turn if able.

card.name: Mileva of the Tenth
card.text: Vigilance, haste Whenever Mileva attacks or blocks, prevent all damage that would be dealt to other creatures you control until end of combat.

card.name: Righteous Smite
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains lifelink until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to any other target.

card.name: War Guildmage RAW
card.text: {1}{RW}, {T}: Create a 1/1 red and white Soldier creature token. {2}{R}{W}: Another target attacking creature you control gets +1/+0 for each other attacking creature you control and gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Loud // Proud
card.text:
Up to two target creatures can't block this turn.
---
Creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Flame-kin Summoner RAW
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token.

card.name: Azorius Insignia
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {U}. {3}{W}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You draw two cards and gain 3 life.

card.name: Boros Insignia RAW
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. {2}{R}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Create two 1/1 red and white Soldier creature tokens. Creatures you control gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Simic Insignia
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}. {1}{G}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains flying and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Rakdos Insignia
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {R}. {1}{B}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Each player discards a card. Draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Golgari Insignia
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {G}. {3}{B}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Mill three cards. You may return a creature card and/or a land card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Opal Medallion
card.text: Multicolored spells you cast cost {W}, {U}, {B}, {R} or {G} (or {1}) less to cast.

card.name: Ancient Monoliths
card.text: Multicolored spells you control can't be countered. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, copy that spell. You may chose new targets for the copy. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Gateless Amulet
card.text: {T}: Untap target land you control. It gains "{T}: Add one mana of any color." until end of turn. {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target land you control becomes a 8/8 Elemental creature that's all colors. Untap it. It's still a land.

card.name: Embersoul Edge
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+1. {5}, Sacrifice equipped creature: This Equipment deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to any target. Activate only as a sorcery. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Ageless Scholar
card.text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card or Gate card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Gatekeeper Golem
card.text: Affinity for Gates (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Gate you control.) Vigilance, hexproof from monocolored This artifact is all colors.

card.name: Ravnican Omnicompass
card.text: This artifact is all colors. Gates you control enter untapped. If you control two or more Gates with different names, creatures you control get +1/+1 and have vigilance. If you control five or more Gates with different names, creatures you control get +4/+4 and have trample.

card.name: Decrepit Gargoyle
card.text: When this creature enters, up to one target player mills two cards. This creature gets +3/+0 and has flying as long as you have exiled two or more cards with it. {2}, {T}: Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Blood Crypt
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Azorius Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Boros Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Breeding Pool
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Undercity Entrance
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, surveil 1. {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a multicolored spell or activate abilities of multicolored permanents or cards you control.

card.name: Golgari Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Hallowed Fountain
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Plaza's Omenpath
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add two mana of different colors. You can't spend this mana to pay generic cost. {6}, {T}: Create a 2/2 Citizen creature token that's all colors.

card.name: Sacred Foundry
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Simic Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Erstwhile Awakener
card.text: Sacrifice another creature: Add one mana of any color. {G}: Exile target card from a graveyard. {3}{B}{B}: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Zafen, Scheming Necromancer RAW
card.text: Ward—Sacrifice a creature. If one or more creature tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus that many 2/1 black Skeleton creature tokens are created instead. {T}, Sacrifice X other creatures: Zafen deals X damage to any target and you gain X life.

card.name: Voracious Deathstinger RAW
card.text: Trample, indestructible Whenever this creature attacks or blocks, each player sacrifices a creature. You gain life equal to the total toughness of creatures sacrificed. Swarm X—{X}{X}{B}{G} ({X}{X}{B}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create X 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Corpse-Pit Goliath RAW
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature or another nontoken creature you control dies, create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token for each +1/+1 counters on it. {BG}, Sacrifice a creature: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Lothran, the Glouton
card.text: Menace Whenever Lothran attacks, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, he gains indestructible until end of turn. Whenever a player sacrifices a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on Lothran.

card.name: Festering Mass RAW
card.text: Attacking creatures you control have deathtouch and lifelink. Each creature card in your graveyard has "Swarm 2—{2}{BG}{BG}." (Exile a creature card from your graveyard and pay {2}{BG}{BG}: Create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Putrefied Tutor
card.text: Search your library for a card, put that card into your graveyard, then shuffle. You may return a card from your graveyard to your hand. Exile this card.

card.name: Remains RAW
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. You draw cards equal to the sacrificed creature's power, then you gain life equal to its toughness.

card.name: Devil RAW RAW
card.text: When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Rakdos Trailblazer
card.text: Trample Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put two +1/+1 counters on it. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Infested Maneater RAW
card.text: Deathtouch, reach Swarm 2—{3}{G} ({3}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Accelerated Growth
card.text: If {U} was spent to cast this spell, look at the top seven cards of your library. Otherwise, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a permanent card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Lamiel, Deathsprout Cultivator RAW
card.text: Whenever one or more other nontoken creatures you control die or one or more cards leave your graveyard, create a 0/1 green Plant creature token. This ability triggers only once each turn. {1}{B}{G}, Discard a permanent card: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Amalgamate
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Destroy target permanent. Add X mana in any combination of colors, where X is that permanent's mana value.

card.name: Elemental Dog RAW RAW
card.text: Menace, haste This creature can't block.

card.name: Treasure RNF RAW
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Citizen RAW
card.text: This creature is all colors.

card.name: Coerced Participation
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step if it has mana value 3 or less.

card.name: Azorius Lawbringer

card.name: Azorius Lawmage
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you didn't cast spells from your hand this turn, untap up to one target creature you control. {1}{U}, {T}: Tap target artifact or creature.

card.name: In Formation!
card.text: You gain hexproof until end of turn. Permanents you control gain indestructible until end of turn. Untap each creature you control.

card.name: Preemptive Measures
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If you've cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand this turn, it also gains first strike and lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Proscribe
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target artifact or enchantment. • Exile target player's graveyard. Draw a card.

card.name: Ready the Arresters RAW
card.text: Create two 1/1 blue and white Soldier creature tokens. Then if this spell was cast from exile, you gain 1 life for each creature you control. Preamble {3}{W} ({3}{W}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Fierce Champion
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) During your turn, this creature has first strike.

card.name: Zealous Arrester
card.text: When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it. Preamble {2}{W} ({2}{W}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Apprehend the Guilty
card.text: Tap up to two target creatures. Put a stun counter on each of them. Preamble {3}{U} ({3}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Detain Wisdom
card.text: Each player mills three cards. You may put a card you milled this way into your hand. Then if {W} was spent to cast this spell, exile each opponent's graveyard.

card.name: Enfeebling Shackles
card.text: Creatures your opponents control get -2/-0 until end of turn. Then if this spell was cast from exile, tap each of those creature with power 1 or less. Preamble {3}{U} ({3}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Inquire
card.text: Draw a card. Preamble {1}{U} ({1}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Jelenn Grand Elocutor
card.text: Spells you cast from exile cost {2} less to cast. Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Precognition Serum
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. Put three of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Preamble {4}{U}{U} ({4}{U}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Denied // Dismissed
card.text:
Target player can't cast spells this turn.
---
Return target spell or nonland permanent an opponent controls to its owner's hand.

card.name: Order Guildmage
card.text: {WU}, {T}: Target creature you control gains flying until end of turn. {2}{W}{U}: You draw a card and gain 1 life.

card.name: Pursuit RAW
card.text: Create two 1/1 colorless Thopter artifact creature tokens with flying.

card.name: Azorius Purifier
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. Whenever an opponent casts a spell or activates an ability of a nonland permanent or card that shares a name with a card exiled with this creature, you draw a card.

card.name: Binding Decree
card.text: Abilities of nonland permanents and cards your opponents activate cost {2} more to activate. {1}{W}{U}: Tap target creature. Scry 2.

card.name: Decipher the Chronology
card.text: Search your library and/or graveyard for another nonland card with mana value 3 or less, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you searched your library this way, shuffle.

card.name: Durand, High Justicar
Futur Seer
card.text: Lifelink, ward {2} At the beginning of your end step, if you haven't cast spells from your hand this turn, look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other at the bottom of your library.

card.name: Incarcerate
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, exile target spell or nonland permanent an opponent controls. Spells with the same name as the exiled card cost {2} more to cast. When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, return the exiled card to its owner's hand.

card.name: Inquisitive Guardmage
card.text: Flying, lifelink When this creature enters, draw a card. Preamble {2}{W}{U} ({2}{W}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Judgment of Balance
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Return all nonland permanents to their owners' hands. Each player may shuffle their hand and graveyard into their library, then each player who does draws seven cards and gains 7 life.

card.name: Lavinia, the Just
card.text: Whenever a player casts a spell from anywhere other than their hand or activates an ability from anywhere other than the battlefield, you may pay {2}. When you do, copy that spell or ability. You may chose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Octave, Deputy of Discipline RAW
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a spell, create a 1/1 white and blue Thopter artifact creature token with flying. If that spell was cast from exile, create a 4/4 white and blue Sphinx creature token with flying and vigilance. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Peruse the Law
card.text: Choose one. If this spell was cast from exile, choose one or more instead. • You draw a card and gain 3 life. • Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Preamble {2}{W}{U} ({2}{W}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Safeguard
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast and can't be countered if it targets a spell that targets you and/or a permanent and/or a spell you control. Counter target spell.

card.name: Seal of Censure
card.text: Until end of turn, nonland permanents lose all abilities. Tap all nonland permanents.

card.name: Sphinx Lawbinder
card.text: Flying, vigilance You have hexproof.

card.name: Drake RAW RAW
card.text: Flying

card.name: Deadly Spore Storm
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. • All creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Arbiter of Law
card.text: Flying Your opponents can't cast creature spells. You may cast creature spells without paying paying their mana cost.

card.name: Thopter RAW RAW
card.text: Flying
